title: Widget slot
summary: Glance-face placeholder substituted by the slot resolver at render.
reason: Firmware-only BY DESIGN (#328 decision): `idx`/`family` have no CBOR keys because substitution requires the device-side glance-face slot resolver (zui_render_set_slot_resolver) - outside glance composition a pushed slot can only render the dashed unassigned placeholder, so streaming one is never meaningful. Glance-composition IR only.
